global_answer_custom_padding="|20px||50px|false|false" _builder_version="4.7.3" _module_preset="default" faq_heading_font="Roboto Mono|700|||||||" faq_heading_text_color="#ffffff" faq_question_closed_font_size_tablet="22px" faq_question_closed_font_size_phone="18px" faq_question_closed_font_size_last_edited="on|tablet" faq_answer_text_font_size_tablet="18px" faq_answer_text_font_size_phone="14px" faq_answer_text_font_size_last_edited="on|tablet" border_radii="on|50px|50px|50px|50px" border_width_all="0px"][dipl_faq_page_schema_item faq_question="Can I use an FAQPage Schema for advertising purposes?" _builder_version="4.6.6" _module_preset="default" box_shadow_style="preset1" box_shadow_blur="4px"]Yes, you can, but it’s not recommended by Google.[/dipl_faq_page_schema_item][dipl_faq_page_schema_item faq_question="Does it mandatory to keep the entire text of the question and answer?" _builder_version="4.6.6" _module_preset="default" box_shadow_style="preset1" box_shadow_blur="4px"]According to Google, it’s recommended that you keep the entire text for both the Question and Answer.[/dipl_faq_page_schema_item][dipl_faq_page_schema_item faq_question="When it’s best to use an FAQ page?" _builder_version="4.6.6" _module_preset="default" box_shadow_style="preset1" box_shadow_blur="4px"]If your page has a list of questions with answers and doesn’t require users to submit alternative answers. In that case, you can use the QAPage schema.[/dipl_faq_page_schema_item][dipl_faq_page_schema_item faq_question="What are the Valid cases of the FAQPage Schema?" _builder_version="4.6.6" _module_preset="default" box_shadow_style="preset1" box_shadow_blur="4px"]

The following are some of the valid use cases of the FAQPage Schema,

  • On your website, you submit both the Questions and Answers. Users just visit that page and look for their queries and read the answers listed under the question text.
  • A product support page that lists FAQs. The same as the above, no way for users to submit alternative answers.
[/dipl_faq_page_schema_item][dipl_faq_page_schema_item faq_question="What are the Invalid cases of the FAQPage Schema?" _builder_version="4.6.6" _module_preset="default" box_shadow_style="preset1" box_shadow_blur="4px"]A forum, product page, and product support page where users can submit alternative answers to a single question. For example, Quora.[/dipl_faq_page_schema_item][/dipl_faq_page_schema][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section]
